checkedInputs: current Hindsight and Beads CLI evidence
reviewPhases.disposition: Plan now treats the deliverable as a shareable full-stack installer, not just a local memory posture cleanup.
Existing installer, bootstrap, audit, canary, tool-stack, and ETRNL state surfaces are reused; full-stack provisioning is profile-driven and gated.
The plan requires a fresh-user core profile and full profile so install docs cannot overclaim what the scripts actually provision.
Full-stack install must not run third-party setup scripts blindly: Hindsight and Beads are provisioned only behind repo-owned gates and rollback metadata.

checkedInputs: Hindsight daemon and Docker quick-start documentation
reviewPhases.disposition: The plan follows native Claude compaction semantics and chooses explicit Hindsight service modes: local daemon by default, external API or Docker by explicit profile.
Plan extends install/bootstrap/profile validators and existing fixtures instead of creating a parallel installer stack.
The plan avoids a full memory rewrite while making install behavior explicit through core and full profiles.

sources.refreshCommand: git rev-parse HEAD && shasum -a 256 scripts/install.sh scripts/bootstrap-tools.sh scripts/lib/skill-lists.sh scripts/canary-hindsight.sh scripts/settings-audit.mjs scripts/tool-stack-check.mjs docs/install.md docs/configuration.md docs/skills.md

jq '{enabledPlugins, autoCompactWindow, hasSkipAutoPermissionPrompt:(has("skipAutoPermissionPrompt")), permissions, hookEvents:(.hooks|keys)}' "$HOME/.claude/settings.json" && claude plugin list && scripts/canary-hindsight.sh && jq 'del(.hindsightApiToken)' "$HOME/.hindsight/claude-code.json"
bd version && bd status --json && bd setup claude --check && bd setup codex --check && bd memories && bd prime --hook-json --memories-only
gh api repos/vectorize-io/hindsight/git/trees/main?recursive=1 and inspect README, hindsight-integrations/claude-code, plugin manifest, hooks manifest, and daemon code
npm view @beads/bd version dist-tags.latest description repository.url --json

skillMatrix.trigger: User invoked etrnl-dev-plan for a file-backed implementation plan.
skillMatrix.evidence: Plan and artifact were created under docs/plans.

skillMatrix.trigger: Implementation will inspect and harden Claude lifecycle hooks, plugin hook manifests, and settings audit behavior.
skillMatrix.evidence: Task groups B, C, D, and E cover hook source inventory, Hindsight canary, lesson hooks, and settings cleanup.

skillMatrix.trigger: Implementation will add or refine install CLI flags, dry-run output, and full-stack profile commands.
skillMatrix.evidence: Task group A requires install profile commands and deterministic dry-run behavior.

skillMatrix.trigger: Hindsight remains a third-party Claude plugin, but the control plane owns its install profile, config templates, and canary expectations.
skillMatrix.evidence: Task group C requires plugin install verification and config materialization without vendoring plugin code.

skillMatrix.trigger: Install profiles and memory posture gates can sprawl across install, bootstrap, settings-audit, tool-stack, doctor, and hooks.
skillMatrix.evidence: Skill routing requires simplifier review after implementation.

skillMatrix.trigger: Hindsight and Beads checks may duplicate existing tool-stack and settings-audit parsing.
skillMatrix.evidence: Skill routing marks duplicate review when implementation crosses the shared validators.

skillMatrix.trigger: Control-plane health-stack behavior and installed-home gates may change.
skillMatrix.evidence: Skill routing marks Brooks as useful when implementation changes broad health-stack enforcement.

skillMatrix.trigger: No tenant, auth, money, i18n, Prisma, permission-domain, or soft-delete application policy is changed.
skillMatrix.evidence: Plan is confined to local Claude Code memory, hooks, settings, and workflow tooling.
skillMatrix.notApplicableRationale: Domain policy skill is unnecessary for local control-plane memory posture.

skillMatrix.trigger: Planned changes are JavaScript, Python, shell, JSON fixtures, and docs unless implementation unexpectedly expands.
skillMatrix.evidence: Ordinary syntax and project workflow checks are still required.
skillMatrix.notApplicableRationale: No exported TypeScript types, API contracts, runtime validation schemas, generated types, state machines, branded IDs, reusable type utilities, or cross-layer DTO boundaries are planned.

decisions.decision: Create public profile manifests so install behavior is versioned, testable, and not hidden in shell branches.
decisions.newSurfaceJustification: Existing settings templates do not describe package installs, service modes, health checks, skip flags, or rollback expectations.

decisions.decision: Create token-free Hindsight config templates for full-stack install profiles.
decisions.newSurfaceJustification: The current local Hindsight config is private runtime state and cannot be copied into a public repo or fresh install.

decisions.decision: Create only if install/profile validation cannot fit cleanly inside existing install and tool-stack checks.
decisions.newSurfaceJustification: Fresh-stack profile validation spans settings, packages, plugin state, services, project DBs, and rollback proof; existing single-purpose validators do not own that whole contract.

decisions.decision: Create synthetic fixtures because existing install fixtures do not model Hindsight plugin provisioning, service modes, or full-stack package bootstrap.
decisions.newSurfaceJustification: Current fixtures prove core install behavior but not shareable full-stack install semantics.

decisions.decision: Create synthetic fixtures because existing fixtures do not model plugin hook manifests, Hindsight config profiles, or Beads prime output classes.
decisions.newSurfaceJustification: The current test corpus covers settings hooks and ETRNL state, but not outside-settings memory hook posture.

decisions.decision: Extend settings-audit rather than create a separate memory-audit command.
Add Hindsight posture to existing tool-stack checks instead of creating an independent version checker.
Refactor existing lesson export hook to use ETRNL-first persistence rather than adding a new hook.

findings.summary: Settings-only audit misses enabled plugin hook sources.
findings.evidence: Installed Hindsight plugin manifest contributes SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, Stop, and SessionEnd hooks outside settings.json.
findings.resolution: Group A requires plugin hook inventory and strict failure for unhealthy memory plugins.

findings.summary: Hindsight is enabled but local configured API is down.
findings.evidence: scripts/canary-hindsight.sh fails against http://127.0.0.1:9077 while plugin list shows hindsight-memory enabled.
findings.resolution: Group B requires supervisor states and red canary semantics before trusting recall.

findings.summary: Raw Beads startup output conflicts with ETRNL workflow authority.
findings.evidence: bd prime --full instructs default Beads task tracking and session close protocol, while ETRNL owns plans and execution ledgers.
findings.resolution: Group E rejects raw prime injection and keeps Beads explicit backlog-only.

findings.summary: Unsupported live settings keys can alter Claude Code experience outside the harness contract.
findings.evidence: Live settings contain autoCompactWindow and skipAutoPermissionPrompt top-level keys.
findings.resolution: Group D requires settings cleanup, template validation, staged diff, and rollback proof.

findings.summary: Hindsight installed plugin version lags upstream release.
findings.evidence: Installed plugin is 0.3.0; GitHub latest checked release is v0.7.2 published 2026-06-02.
findings.resolution: Group B and verification gates require version reporting and post-upgrade canary.

findings.summary: Current installer is not a complete shareable full-stack installer.
findings.evidence: install dry-run reports core Claude/Codex files and conditional CodeGraph/Beads bootstrap, but no Hindsight plugin/service provisioning and no full profile.
findings.resolution: Group A adds core/full profiles, dry-run contract, stack profile validation, staged install tests, and explicit full-stack canaries.

findings.summary: Noninteractive install can silently skip tool bootstrap.
findings.evidence: install.sh skips bootstrap in noninteractive mode unless CLAUDE_CONTROL_PLANE_BOOTSTRAP_TOOLS=1.
findings.resolution: Full profile must fail closed on missing Hindsight, Beads, or CodeGraph unless explicit skip flags are supplied.

findings.summary: Hindsight supports multiple install and service modes that are not represented in this repo's installer.
findings.evidence: Upstream supports Claude plugin install, local daemon through uvx hindsight-embed, external API, Docker server, and plugin hooks.
findings.resolution: Group C adds mode selection, token-free templates, plugin install verification, service health, and rollback metadata.

completionAudit.evidence: docs/plans/2026-06-05-claude-code-memory-hindsight-beads-plan.md exists with all required plan sections.
Live settings, settings-audit, canary, plugin list, Hindsight release, redacted config, and Beads commands were refreshed before finalizing.
Plan explicitly keeps ETRNL authority, Hindsight supervised semantic recall, and Beads explicit backlog state.
Plan now requires core and full install profiles with Hindsight, Beads, CodeGraph, Claude hooks, Codex skills, config templates, canaries, and rollback proof.

tddEvidence.rationaleWhenNotTestFirst: This is a planning artifact; implementation must add the red full-profile dry-run, missing-prerequisite, silent-skip, and rollback fixtures before changing installer behavior.
This is a planning artifact; implementation must add the red plugin-hook and risky-settings fixtures before modifying audit logic.
The plan names the red Hindsight API-down, mode-mismatch, unsafe-retention, and version-lag probes to run before implementation.
The implementation must first add privacy and export-red fixtures proving ETRNL-first behavior before changing the hook.
The plan requires red fixtures for raw bd prime rejection and active execution noise before code or doc changes.

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Deep dive into Hindsight versus Beads for Claude Code memory.
completionReconciliation.evidence: Plan evidence separates Hindsight semantic recall from Beads explicit backlog state and cites current installed behavior.

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Adversarially find gaps, loose ends, and improvements without reassurance.
completionReconciliation.evidence: Findings ledger records settings-only audit blind spot, API-down Hindsight, raw Beads conflict, unsupported settings keys, and version lag.

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Research hooks, context, auto-compact, PostCompact, Beads, Dolt, and what to keep or lose from ETRNL.
completionReconciliation.evidence: Plan keeps ETRNL compact state, rejects hook-triggered compact, rejects Beads or Dolt as hook-runtime authority, and adds hook-source inventory.

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Compare to what is currently applied in the local Claude Code setup.
completionReconciliation.evidence: Plan evidence includes live settings keys, enabled plugins, plugin hook manifest, Hindsight canary failure, and Beads setup checks.

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Produce an executable plan rather than another surface summary.
completionReconciliation.evidence: Plan includes task groups, phases, test-first red probes, verification gates, rollback, and execution handoff.

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Improve the plan so this repo installs like a shareable stack where a fresh user can provision Hindsight, Beads, hooks, skills, and config.
completionReconciliation.evidence: Plan now requires core and full install profiles, Hindsight plugin/service provisioning, Beads binary and project DB provisioning without raw hooks, CodeGraph MCP setup, config templates, doctor/canary gates, and rollback proof.

analogs: current CodeGraph and Beads bootstrap helper
current dual Claude/Codex install test coverage
reuseBindings.decision: Add profile manifests and possibly a stack-profile validator while extending existing install/bootstrap scripts.
reuseBindings.newSurfaceJustification: Current installer has no declarative full-stack contract for Hindsight service mode, Beads policy, CodeGraph MCP, package pins, health checks, or rollback artifacts.

analogs: Hindsight upstream Claude Code plugin install docs
reuseBindings.decision: Add token-free Hindsight config templates and full-profile provisioning while keeping plugin code third-party.
reuseBindings.newSurfaceJustification: Current repo can check Hindsight but cannot install, configure, or deploy it for a fresh user.

reuseBindings.decision: Extend settings-audit with plugin and frontmatter hook source visibility.

analogs: deep-stack positive and negative fixture pattern
reuseBindings.decision: Create tests/fixtures/memory-posture for plugin manifests, Hindsight configs, and Beads prime outputs.
reuseBindings.newSurfaceJustification: No existing fixture family models memory plugin posture or raw Beads startup doctrine.

reuseBindings.decision: Harden existing canary and tool-stack surfaces instead of creating a new Hindsight command.

analogs: ETRNL JSONL append and privacy validation
reuseBindings.decision: Refactor the existing lesson exporter to append ETRNL state first, then optional Hindsight export.
Extend existing Beads install/check surfaces while enforcing raw-prime rejection and dry-run bridge tests.
Reuse bootstrap-tools and tool-stack-check for full-profile CodeGraph provisioning.

sourceGate.evidence: Plan readiness and deep-stack gates are required before execution; live evidence was refreshed read-only.

stagedInstall.evidence: This plan does not mutate installed homes; staged install proof is required during implementation before live rollout.

stagedDoctor.evidence: Staged doctor and Hindsight canary are required during implementation after staged install.

rollbackVerification.evidence: Rollback rehearsal is required during implementation before live settings or plugin mutation.

liveInstallDecision.evidence: Live Claude home mutation requires explicit Victor approval after source and staged gates pass.

postUpgradeCanary.evidence: Post-upgrade canary is required only after live Hindsight or settings rollout.

riskTier.reason: Planning and source-readiness work is Tier 2; implementation escalates to Tier 3 before live Claude home, plugin, package-manager, service, or project DB mutation.
riskTier.verificationGate: node scripts/plan-readiness-check.mjs docs/plans/2026-06-05-claude-code-memory-hindsight-beads-plan.md && tests/test-install.sh && tests/test-hooks.sh && tests/test-workflow-tools.sh && scripts/doctor.sh
acceptedRisks: Final live Hindsight posture still requires staged proof because the current plugin is enabled while its configured API is down.
Full-profile package and service mutation remains blocked until source tests and rollback rehearsal pass.

typescript.ordinaryVerification: Node syntax checks for modified JavaScript files; Python compile for modified Python hooks; shell and workflow tests for hook scripts; TypeScript project check is not triggered unless implementation touches TypeScript.

advancedTypes.notApplicableRationale: No exported/public TypeScript types, API contracts, runtime validation schemas, generated types, state machines, branded IDs, reusable type utilities, or cross-layer DTO boundaries are planned.
